title: Clausena lansium
intro: Clausena lansium, also known as the Malay lime or tropical lime, is a tropical evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant is valued for its numerous health benefits, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Clausena lansium include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and limonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from Clausena lansium include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
taxonomy: Clausena lansium is classified in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. This family includes various other plant species such as citrus fruits, as well as herbs and trees. Within the Rutaceae family, Clausena lansium is placed in the genus Clausena, which comprises a range of tropical and subtropical plants. The genus Clausena is further divided into several species, with Clausena lansium being one of the notable ones. Clausena lansium is often referred to as the wax apple or Malay plum due to its edible fruit.
uses: Clausena lansium, also known as the Malaysian plum or wani, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The fruit, leaves, and bark of the plant have been employed to treat different ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In traditional medicine, the plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Clausena lansium is also used to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation. Additionally, the plant is used to treat respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds.

parts: Clausena lansium, also known as the Malay lime or calamansi, is a plant with various medicinal properties. preparations: Clausena lansium, also known as the Malay lime or Philippine lime, is used in various herbal preparations due to its medicinal properties. side_effects: Clausena lansium, also known as malayan plum or Malay lakoocha, is a tropical fruit-bearing tree native to Southeast Asia. However, limited information is available on its side effects.
